title: Mining and Geological Engineers, Including Mining Safety Engineers
description: Conduct subsurface surveys to identify the characteristics of potential land or mining development sites. May specify the ground support systems, processes, and equipment for safe, economical, and environmentally sound extraction or underground construction activities. May inspect areas for unsafe geological conditions, equipment, and working conditions. May design, implement, and coordinate mine safety programs.

tasks.text: Prepare technical reports for use by mining, engineering, and management personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect mining areas for unsafe structures, equipment, and working conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select or develop mineral location, extraction, and production methods, based on factors such as safety, cost, and deposit characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select locations and plan underground or surface mining operations, specifying processes, labor usage, and equipment that will result in safe, economical, and environmentally sound extraction of minerals and ores.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare schedules, reports, and estimates of the costs involved in developing and operating mines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor mine production rates to assess operational effectiveness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise, train, and evaluate technicians, technologists, survey personnel, engineers, scientists or other mine personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine maps, deposits, drilling locations, or mines to determine the location, size, accessibility, contents, value, and potential profitability of mineral, oil, and gas deposits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design, implement, and monitor the development of mines, facilities, systems, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test air to detect toxic gases and recommend measures to remove them, such as installation of ventilation shafts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement and coordinate mine safety programs, including the design and maintenance of protective and rescue equipment and safety devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Devise solutions to problems of land reclamation and water and air pollution, such as methods of storing excavated soil and returning exhausted mine sites to natural states.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out, direct, and supervise mine construction operations, such as the construction of shafts and tunnels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, develop, and implement computer applications for use in mining operations such as mine design, modeling, or mapping or for monitoring mine conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select or devise materials-handling methods and equipment to transport ore, waste materials, and mineral products efficiently and economically.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate data to develop new mining products, equipment, or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design mining and mineral treatment equipment and machinery in collaboration with other engineering specialists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or direct mining experiments to test or prove research findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
